Strategic Summary

Sarah has been a consistent supporter of education initiatives for 6+ years. Strong alignment with literacy and youth programs.

Relationship Context

Oct 12, 2023

In-person Meeting Notes

Discussed the expansion of the Literacy First program. Sarah expressed interest in measurable student outcomes over sheer volume.

Sept 28, 2023

Email Exchange

Follow-up on the Annual Gala invitation. Confirmed her seat and asked about guest accommodations.

Aug 15, 2023

Event Attended

Annual Summer Gala - Platinum Sponsor table host.

lightbulb

What matters to them

Sarah prioritizes long-term sustainability and verifiable student outcomes. She prefers deep technical reports over high-level marketing material.

AI Message Draft
